description_long: This object is a modern school complex featuring a large, multi-story main building with a flat roof and numerous windows, typical of contemporary educational architecture. The campus includes a green soccer field and a brown rectangular area likely used as a playground or sports court, both surrounded by open paved spaces. Several smaller auxiliary structures are present, possibly for storage or maintenance, and a row of trees lines one side, providing shade and visual appeal. The main building is set back from the street, with a driveway or parking area in front, and the overall layout is organized and spacious. The color palette is dominated by white and gray, with green from the field and brown from the playground. The design emphasizes functionality, accessibility, and open outdoor areas for student activities.
description: A modern school complex with a multi-story main building, sports field, playground, and auxiliary structures, surrounded by open paved areas and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main school building, sports field, playground, and auxiliary structures, with trees lining the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the soccer field and playground, with the main building and auxiliary structures visible in the background.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the main building, the green sports field, and the row of trees and auxiliary structures.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the playground, trees, and the main building from a different angle, with the sports field in the background.
